channel.title: Parent Panel on IDPicker Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Parent Panel on IDPicker Docs

item.title: Authentication and Account
item.description:
This guide covers parent login, registration, verification, setup-password, and reset-password flows.

A) Parent Login (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open parent login URL from Access URLs.
  2. Click email/username input.
  3. Enter your parent account email.
  4. Click password input.
  5. Enter password.
  6. Optional: Click eye icon to reveal password.
  7. Click Sign In.
  8. Wait for redirect to /dashboard.

Expected result:

  • Parent auth token cookie is set.
  • Parent dashboard loads.

B) Parent Registration (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open Register page.
  2. Fill email.
  3. Fill full name.
  4. Fill password.
  5. Enable consent checkbox.
  6. Click Register.
  7. Verify toast/confirmation message about email verification.
  8. Return to login.

C) Verify Email

  1. Open verification link from email.
  2. Wait for auto-verification.
  3. On success, parent is redirected to dashboard.
  4. If token invalid/expired, use resend verification.

D) Setup Password from Invitation Link

  1. Open setup-password URL with token.
  2. Wait for token validation.
  3. Enter new password (minimum length requirement applies).
  4. Confirm password.
  5. Submit.
  6. Return to login and sign in.

E) Request Password Reset

  1. Open login reset-password page.
  2. Enter parent email.
  3. Click Send Reset Link.
  4. Check inbox/spam folder.

F) Complete Password Reset

  1. Open reset link with token.
  2. Enter new password.
  3. Confirm password.
  4. Submit reset.
  5. Log in with updated password.

Common Parent Questions

Q: Login returns parents-only error. A: Credentials belong to non-parent role; use correct parent account.

item.title: Linked Student Guide
item.description:
This guide explains how parents link students, open student details, and unlink when needed.

A) Link a Student by Email (Click-by-Click)

  1. Sign in to Parent Dashboard.
  2. Find the Link Student form on dashboard.
  3. Click Student Email input.
  4. Enter student’s registered email.
  5. Click Send Link Request.
  6. Wait for one of these outcomes:
    • linked: student appears immediately in dashboard list.
    • pending: request registered, awaiting matching student-side action.

B) Open Linked Student

  1. In dashboard linked-student cards, click View Student.
  2. Open /dashboard/{studentId} detail page.
  3. Review summary sections (progress, recommendations, assessments, mentor/advisor activity).

C) Refresh Linked Data

  1. Click refresh action in parent dashboard or student detail page.
  2. Wait for latest API data to load.
  3. Confirm unread counts and progress values update.

D) Unlink Student

  1. Open linked student detail.
  2. Find unlink/remove access action.
  3. Confirm unlink prompt.
  4. Return to dashboard and verify student card is removed.

What Parents Can View

  • Progress summary
  • Milestone completion
  • Selected recommendation insights
  • Journey map preview/download
  • Advisor unread indicators and parent-advisor messaging context

What Parents Cannot Edit

  • Student-only private settings
  • Restricted assessment configuration
  • Student account credentials/profile ownership fields

Common Parent Questions

Q: I sent link request but student does not appear. A: Link may be pending; ask student to complete corresponding link step.

item.title: Dashboard and Linked Overview
item.description:
Parent dashboard is the main overview for all linked children.

A) Open Parent Dashboard

  1. Log in as parent.
  2. Wait for dashboard home to load.
  3. Confirm linked children cards are visible (or empty state if none).

B) Understand Dashboard Blocks

Typical sections include:

  • Linked children summary cards
  • Progress and completion snapshots
  • Recommendation and advisor activity indicators
  • Link-student request form

C) Link Student from Dashboard

  1. Find Link Student form.
  2. Enter student email.
  3. Submit request.
  4. If linked instantly, select student card.
  5. If pending, wait for student-side completion.

D) Open Student Card

  1. Click linked student card.
  2. Navigate to student detail page.
  3. Review student-specific information.

E) Refresh Parent Snapshot Data

  1. Click refresh action.
  2. Wait for loading states to complete.
  3. Confirm summary values are updated.

F) Legacy Students Route Note

If /dashboard/students is opened directly, parent app redirects back to /dashboard.

item.title: Student Detail, Journey Map, and Advisor Chat
item.description:
This guide covers the parent child-detail page, journey-map outputs, and advisor chat context.

A) Open Student Detail

  1. From parent dashboard, click linked student card.
  2. Open /dashboard/{studentId} page.
  3. Confirm student header (name/avatar/basic profile) appears.

B) Review Progress and Insights

In student detail, review:

  • Assessment progress and completion indicators
  • Recommendations summary
  • Mentor and advisor activity
  • Premium/subscription status context

C) Journey Map Preview (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open Journey Map section.
  2. Select data point filters:
    • demographics
    • education
    • psychological
    • career
    • social
    • family
    • health
  3. Click Preview.
  4. Review returned structured preview.

D) Journey Map Download

  1. Keep selected data points.
  2. Click Download/Generate Journey Map.
  3. Wait for map link generation.
  4. Open generated map link in browser.

E) Advisor Chat Indicators and Access

  1. Locate advisor chat panel/button in student detail.
  2. Check unread count badge.
  3. Open parent-advisor chat if available.
  4. Read thread and send message if enabled in panel.

F) Subscription Plans View

  1. Open subscription area on child detail.
  2. Review available plans and selected plan state.
  3. Continue purchase flow when enabled in deployment.

Common Parent Questions

Q: Journey map preview is empty. A: Ensure at least one data point is selected.

item.title: Parent Forms
item.description:
Parent panel supports dynamic form responses through /form/{responseId} routes.

A) Open Parent Form

  1. Open form link from dashboard, notification, or direct URL.
  2. Wait for form load.
  3. Confirm form title/description is visible.
  4. If organization banner exists, review context section at top.

B) Fill Form Fields (Click-by-Click)

For each question:

  1. Read label and required marker.
  2. Enter/select answer according to field type.
  3. Continue until all required fields are complete.

Supported field types include:
